hooks.prompt: Check if the file just written meets ALL of these conditions: (1) it is a .md or .mdx file, (2) it contains YAML frontmatter with blog-specific fields like title/description/date/author/tags, AND (3) the file path is NOT inside any of these directories: docs/, .claude/, memory/, plans/, skills/, agents/, hooks/, references/. If ALL conditions are met, remind the user to run /smart-blog-skills:analyze for quality scoring. Otherwise, do absolutely nothing — no output, no comment.
